user.title: Search for your address
user.description: Enter your postcode or street name to find your property.

data_description.query: Enter a full Lewisham postcode or part of a street name.

select.title: Select your address
select.description: Select your property from the list below.

data_description.uprn: Choose the address whose collection schedule you want to add.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Lewisham Council. Please check your connection and try again.
error.invalid_query: Search query must be at least 3 characters.
error.no_addresses_found: No addresses found. Try a different postcode or street name.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

schedule_not_found.message: No collection schedule found for UPRN {uprn}: {error}
